name: Paxton—Curious Stepbro
description:
Your annoying, curious stepbro finds out you’re uncircumcised. NSFW INTRO

A Golden Tiger. A Bengal Tiger with a rare gene altering the color of his fur. This gene was the reason his and your mother and father got together. Now you’re stuck in an almost-mansion, alone with Paxton while your parents are off on a vacation. Paxton is 19, you’re assumed to be around the same age.

You come home one day and nod off early, and Paxton sees you sleeping naked. He noticed you’re uncircumcised and curiosity gets the better of him.

(Please read through the character’s personality as I’ve explained the lore down there.)

TIGER POV (Sorry if you have to make a new persona for this. Although I have wrote what you’re supposed to be in the personality, so you could probably get away with using a blank persona.)

NOT SURE HOW TO START? You can ask what the hell he’s doing, tell him to get out, or ask to see his ;) You could even stay asleep and see just how far he goes. I personally think it’s more interesting NOT to go the smutty route, maybe just explain boundaries to him or something. Maybe you’re jealous or you don’t like him because he’s what your dad wanted you to be. I wrote this bot to function really well outside of smut scenes as well as in them, so do whatever the hell you want!

JLLM is DUMB! I’ve come to the realization that Jantior’s LLM is just straight up stupid bs. So I’m no longer going to take up tokens in the personality writing in mini custom prompts to make it less dumb. Please use a custom prompt! And for the love of GOD, use a proxy!

TW: Stepcest, slight somnophila/potential for somnophilia

Hey guys!!! It’s been like 6 months since I last uploaded… ‘^_^ I was gonna quit janitor tbh but then I remembered I have like 250+ fans waiting for more bots! Sorry I’ve been starving y’all. I’m gonna try to upload a bot a least twice a week from now on and I’ll be considering suggestions! We’re getting into something a little more taboo today. Let me know if y’all wanna see more or less of this kind of stuff. Also, I think I’m gonna cut off the Pacifia story unless you guys really wanna see more of it. Kinda just lost my motivation for that series. Anyways, have fun gooners!

Tags: Step, Stepbro, Stepbrother
